summary: On March 5-6, 2026, operators of the Russian "Rubicon" Center conducted strikes in the Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman directions, destroying 128 Ukrainian targets on March 5 (including a 2S22 "Bogdan," M109, and T-64BV tank) and 107 on March 6, while intercepting over 1,500 Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs using FPV drones—75% of which were Leleka-100, Furya, and other models. In Krasny Liman, a FAB-3000 bomb with UMPK struck Ukrainian fortifications, captured via optical fiber FPV drone "KVN." Russian forces also downed a Ukrainian "Furiiya" reconnaissance drone on the Donetsk front and thwarted a "Lyutyy" drone strike on a critical facility in the Sumy sector. Meanwhile, Ukrainian forces evacuated a wounded soldier on the Pokrovsk axis through coordinated action by the 25th Sicheslav Airborne Brigade and 68th Jaeger Brigade.
